name: REST Source
description: HTTP GET/POST against a REST connector baseUrl + path; emit JSON payload (and records when the body is an array).

env.CONNECTOR_CONFIG: REST connector JSON (required: baseUrl; optional: timeoutMs, api_key, headers)
env.DEPLOYMENT_CONFIG: Step/pipeline deployment overrides (required after merge: region)
env.EXECUTION_CONFIG: Step overrides (required: path; optional: method, query, headers, timeoutMs)
env.PIPELET_DEFAULTS: Optional JSON with deploymentConfiguration / executionConfiguration defaults
